doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: partial
reason: The ADEA statutory content is accurate, but this specific "Section 8, Effective February 2018" format does not match verifiable EEOC Compliance Manual structure and the language appears partly modernized or fabricated.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 72
REASON: The ADEA statutory basics are accurate, but the EEOC Compliance Manual Section 8 does not exist in this exact form (the EEOC has published guidance on age discrimination, but not as "Section 8, Effective February 2018" in this specific format), and some phrasing appears modernized beyond verifiable official language.
